entries.source: Chat Edit: 'No not the md file, the actual IDE'

Chat Edit: 'IMPLEMENTED (5/12 components):
  ✅ MainWindow - Core IDE (51 KB + 18 KB)
  ✅ Agentic Puppeteer - Failure correction (19.7 KB + 6.6 KB)
  ✅ GGUF Server - Model serving (21.2 KB + 4.8 KB) 
  ✅ Agentic Failure Detector - Error detection (18.7 KB + 5.6 KB)
  ✅ Agentic Self Corrector - Auto-fix (10.3 KB + 2.7 KB)

MISSING (7/12 components):
  ❌ Model Queue - Multi-model scheduling
  ❌ Streaming Inference API - Token streaming      
  ❌ GPU Backend - CUDA/HIP/Vulkan acceleration     
  ❌ Metrics Collector - Performance telemetry      
  ❌ Backup Manager - BCDR system
  ❌ Compliance Logger - SOC2/HIPAA logging
  ❌ SLA Manager - 99.99% uptime monitoring'
